name: GH_Document.GH_UndoUtil
summary: This class is emitted by the Undo property of a GH_Document instance.

methods.name: CreateAddObjectEvent(String, IGH_DocumentObject)
methods.signature: public GH_UndoRecord CreateAddObjectEvent(string name, IGH_DocumentObject obj)
methods.summary: Create a new undo record for a single object addition.

returns.doc: A newly created undo record.

methods.name: CreateAddObjectEvent(String, IEnumerable<IGH_DocumentObject>)
methods.signature: public GH_UndoRecord CreateAddObjectEvent(string name, IEnumerable<IGH_DocumentObject> objs)
methods.summary: Create a new undo record for a bunch of object additions.

returns.doc: A newly created undo record.

methods.name: CreateAddStateEvent
methods.signature: public GH_UndoRecord CreateAddStateEvent(string name, int stateIndex, GH_State state)
methods.summary: Create a new undo record for a single solution state addition.

returns.doc: A newly created undo record.

methods.name: CreateEnabledEvent
methods.signature: public GH_UndoRecord CreateEnabledEvent(string name, IGH_ActiveObject obj)
methods.summary: Create a new undo record for an object enabled change. This function must be called before the enabled flag is changed.

returns.doc: A newly created undo record.

methods.name: CreateGenericObjectEvent
methods.signature: public GH_UndoRecord CreateGenericObjectEvent(string name, IGH_DocumentObject obj)
methods.summary: Create a new undo record for a generic, single object change.

returns.doc: A newly created undo record.

methods.name: CreateLayoutEvent(String, IGH_DocumentObject)
methods.signature: public GH_UndoRecord CreateLayoutEvent(string name, IGH_DocumentObject obj)
methods.summary: Create a new undo record for a single object layout change. This function must be called before the layout is changed.

returns.doc: A newly created undo record.

methods.name: CreateLayoutEvent(String, IEnumerable<IGH_DocumentObject>)
methods.signature: public GH_UndoRecord CreateLayoutEvent(string name, IEnumerable<IGH_DocumentObject> objs)
methods.summary: Create a new undo record for a bunch of object layout changes. This function must be called before the layouts are changed.

returns.doc: A newly created undo record.

methods.name: CreateNickNameEvent
methods.signature: public GH_UndoRecord CreateNickNameEvent(string name, IGH_DocumentObject obj)
methods.summary: Create a new undo record for an object nickname change. This function must be called before the nickname is changed.

returns.doc: A newly created undo record.

methods.name: CreatePersistentDataEvent<T>
methods.signature: public GH_UndoRecord CreatePersistentDataEvent<T>(string name, GH_PersistentParam<T> obj) where T : class, IGH_Goo
methods.summary: Create a new undo record for a single object persistent data change.

returns.doc: A newly created undo record.

methods.name: CreatePivotEvent(String, IGH_DocumentObject)
methods.signature: public GH_UndoRecord CreatePivotEvent(string name, IGH_DocumentObject obj)
methods.summary: Create a new undo record for a single pivot change. This function must be called before the pivot is changed.

returns.doc: A newly created undo record.

methods.name: CreatePivotEvent(String, IEnumerable<IGH_DocumentObject>)
methods.signature: public GH_UndoRecord CreatePivotEvent(string name, IEnumerable<IGH_DocumentObject> objs)
methods.summary: Create a new undo record for a bunch of pivot changes. This function must be called before the pivots are changed.

returns.doc: A newly created undo record.

methods.name: CreatePreviewEvent
methods.signature: public GH_UndoRecord CreatePreviewEvent(string name, IGH_ActiveObject obj)
methods.summary: Create a new undo record for an object preview change. This function must be called before the preview is changed.

returns.doc: A newly created undo record.

methods.name: CreateRemoveObjectEvent(String, IGH_DocumentObject)
methods.signature: public GH_UndoRecord CreateRemoveObjectEvent(string name, IGH_DocumentObject obj)
methods.summary: Create a new undo record for a single object removal.

returns.doc: A newly created undo record.

methods.name: CreateRemoveObjectEvent(String, IEnumerable<IGH_DocumentObject>)
methods.signature: public GH_UndoRecord CreateRemoveObjectEvent(string name, IEnumerable<IGH_DocumentObject> objs)
methods.summary: Create a new undo record for a bunch of object removals.

returns.doc: A newly created undo record.

methods.name: CreateRemoveStateEvent
methods.signature: public GH_UndoRecord CreateRemoveStateEvent(string name, int stateIndex, GH_State state)
methods.summary: Create a new undo record for a single solution state removal.

returns.doc: A newly created undo record.

methods.name: CreateReplaceStateEvent
methods.signature: public GH_UndoRecord CreateReplaceStateEvent(string name, int stateIndex, GH_State oldState, GH_State newState)
methods.summary: Create a new undo record for a single solution state addition.

returns.doc: A newly created undo record.

methods.name: CreateWireEvent(String, IGH_Param)
methods.signature: public GH_UndoRecord CreateWireEvent(string name, IGH_Param param)
methods.summary: Create a new undo record for a set of Connector wire changes. This function must be called before the wires are changed.

returns.doc: A newly created undo record.

methods.name: CreateWireEvent(String, IEnumerable<IGH_Param>)
methods.signature: public GH_UndoRecord CreateWireEvent(string name, IEnumerable<IGH_Param> params)
methods.summary: Create a new undo record for a set of Connector wire changes. This function must be called before the wires are changed.

returns.doc: A newly created undo record.

methods.name: MergeRecords
methods.signature: public bool MergeRecords(int count)
methods.summary: Attempt to merge the N most recent records into one. The name of the merged record will be identical to the name of the oldest record.

params.name: count
params.doc: Number of most recent records to merge.

returns.doc: True if merge was successful.

methods.name: RecordAddObjectEvent(String, IGH_DocumentObject)
methods.signature: public Guid RecordAddObjectEvent(string name, IGH_DocumentObject obj)
methods.summary: Create and Record a new ObjectAdded undo record.

returns.doc: The ID of the newly added undo record or Guid.Empty on failure.

methods.signature: public Guid RecordAddObjectEvent(string name, IEnumerable<IGH_DocumentObject> objs)
methods.summary: Create and Record a new ObjectAdded undo record.
